name: Route Package Protection & Tracking API
what_it_does: Route package protection and post-purchase experience REST API for e-commerce brands offering shipment tracking, package protection insurance, and carbon-neutral shipping. Enables AI agents to manage package protection opt-in and premium collection for shipping insurance automation, handle package issue resolution (lost, stolen, damaged) for claims processing automation, access multi-carrier order tracking and status for post-purchase visibility automation, retrieve branded tracking page delivery for merchant-branded post-purchase experience, manage carbon neutral shipping offset registration for sustainability program automation, handle instant reorder and issue resolution workflow for claims-free resolution, access consumer engagement and product discovery features for post-purchase upsell automation, retrieve package protection analytics and claim rate reporting for risk management intelligence, manage merchant claims dashboard and resolution status for customer service automation, and integrate Route with Shopify, BigCommerce, and WooCommerce for checkout protection opt-in.
use_cases: Protecting packages from shipping claims agents
Resolving lost/stolen packages from CS agents
Tracking orders from post-purchase experience agents
Offering carbon offset shipping from sustainability agents
not_for: High-value goods requiring carrier declared value (use carrier insurance)
best_when: A DTC e-commerce brand wanting AI agents to automate package protection opt-in, lost/stolen/damaged package claim resolution, branded post-purchase tracking, and carbon-neutral shipping offset for consumer shipments.
avoid_when: PACKAGE PROTECTION REGULATORY CLASSIFICATION AS INSURANCE: Route package protection is marketed as 'package protection' rather than traditional insurance in some jurisdictions; in states where Route's product is regulated as insurance, automated upsell without proper insurance disclosure may create regulatory compliance exposure; verify Route's regulatory classification in merchant's primary sales jurisdictions. CLAIM RESOLUTION ACCURACY FOR FRAUD PREVENTION: Automated package issue resolution (instant reorder, refund) via Route must implement claim validation before resolution; automated claim approval without carrier tracking evidence review enables fraudulent claims (false lost, false stolen); Route provides claim validation tools but fraud gate logic must be implemented in merchant automation. CARBON OFFSET CALCULATION TRANSPARENCY: Route carbon neutral shipping offsets are purchased by Route on consumer behalf; automated carbon neutral marketing claims based on Route offsets require Route's offset methodology disclosure; automated 'carbon neutral shipping' claims without underlying offset verification may create FTC greenwashing exposure.

auth.notes: Route uses API key and OAuth authentication. REST API with JSON. Lehi, Utah HQ. Founded 2018 by Evan Walker. Private ($200M+ raised, Series C, investors: Softbank Vision Fund 2, Upper90, Salesforce Ventures). 13,000+ merchant partners. Package protection widget at e-commerce checkout. Carbon neutral shipping offset. Branded tracking and post-purchase engagement. Competes with AfterShip, Narvar, and Shipsurance for post-purchase and package protection.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Merchant earns share of package protection premium collected from consumers; no upfront merchant cost for basic protection
pricing.paid_tiers: Revenue share model: Route collects protection premium from consumers at checkout; merchants receive revenue share; premium merchant features (tracking, engage) have subscription pricing
pricing.notes: Lehi UT. Private ($200M+, SoftBank Vision Fund 2). Founded 2018. 13,000+ merchants. Consumer-funded package protection via checkout widget. Revenue share model for merchants.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; tracking and claim status queries throttled; webhooks for order and claim events

known_agent_gotchas: CLAIM VALIDATION BEFORE AUTOMATED RESOLUTION: Route instant reorder and refund resolution for lost/stolen/damaged claims requires carrier tracking evidence review; automated claim approval without evidence validation creates fraudulent claim cost; implement claim evidence check (tracking stall, USPS LDA confirmation, consumer photo for damaged) before automated resolution

PACKAGE PROTECTION REGULATORY STATE JURISDICTION VARIANCE: Route's package protection product has different regulatory classifications across US states; in some jurisdictions it may be classified as surplus lines insurance requiring disclosure; automated checkout upsell without state-specific regulatory compliance check creates potential consumer protection exposure

CONSUMER OPT-IN VS OPT-OUT CONFIGURATION IMPACT ON CLAIM RATE: Route can be configured as opt-in (consumer selects) or opt-out (pre-selected at checkout); opt-out configuration increases protection attach rate but may create unintended consumer charges for consumers unaware they purchased protection; monitor consumer disputes and chargeback rate for opt-out configuration

Carbon offset methodology and third-party verification — Route carbon neutral shipping offsets are purchased through carbon credit markets; automated 'carbon neutral shipping' marketing claims require verifiable third-party offset methodology; FTC Green Guides enforcement on unverified carbon claims creates greenwashing regulatory risk for merchant automated marketing

Branded tracking page vs Route app consumer destination — Route routes consumers to Route mobile app or branded tracking page depending on merchant configuration; automated post-purchase communication should direct consumers to the correct destination; inconsistent consumer destination creates post-purchase experience confusion

Merchant claim dashboard vs API claim management — Route provides merchant claim dashboard for manual review and Route API for automated claim status; complex claims (high-value, disputed) may require merchant manual review even with API integration; implement escalation path for automated claim resolution failures requiring human merchant review
agent_readiness.security_notes: Package protection and post-purchase. SOC2. API key/OAuth. US. Consumer order, claim, and protection premium data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Package protection. SOC2. API key/OAuth. US. Consumer order and protection data.
